ocr.text: In the context of PepsiCo's ongoing commitment to growth and sustainability within the food and beverage sector, the following
table presents critical metrics related to franchise expansion and operational performance.
FranchiseMetrics  Q32023  NorthAmerica
FinancialRatios  Profitability  Liquidity
GrowthRates  SalesGrowth  MarketShare  FranchiseCount
P/ERatio  CurrentRatio  Debt/Equity  NetProfitMargin  ROE  ROA
Specifically, the data reflects the Restaurant same-store sales and packaging sustainability initiatives, which are essential to our
strategic objectives. The columns detailing the Net Profit Margin and Sales Growth for Q3 2023 compared to Q3 2022 highlight
the company's resilience and adaptability in a competitive market.
FinancialRatios  PerformanceIndices  P/ERatio  CurrentRatio  LiquidityMetrics
Q32023  Q32022  Change(%)  Debt/Equity  GrossMargin  NetProfitMargin  ReturnonEquity  SalesGrowth
Notably, the changes in these metrics provide insights into the effectiveness of our recent marketing campaigns and menu
innovations aimed at enhancing customer experience while driving revenue. Furthermore, the Debt/Equity ratio underscores our
approach to maintaining a balanced capital structure, ensuring sufficient liquidity for future expansions, and aligning with our
sustainability goals.
SustainabilityMetrics  MaterialUsage
PlasticReduction(%)  RecycledContent(%)  WasteDiversion(%)  RenewableEnergy(%)  WaterUsage(L)
QuarterlyTotal  15.4  30  85  40  500000
As we navigate the complexities of the North American market, these metrics serve as key indicators of our financial health and
operational efficiencies, guiding our strategic decisions moving forward.
